datasets.name: rlc-annotated
datasets.license_usage_status: Archive contains MIT license; full corpus is still not vendored by default.
known_limitations: Token-boundary edit spans are not aligned to checker character offsets yet.
Unchanged sentence pairs are skipped unless --keep-uncorrected is passed.
rlc_test.csv is grouped by unique source/correction pair to avoid duplicate examples.

datasets.name: lorugec
datasets.license_usage_status: No explicit OSI-style license observed in the prior archive; keep raw/full normalized data local-only until terms are clear.
known_limitations: Workbook import preserves rule metadata but does not provide source spans.
M2 fallback preserves token spans but carries less rule metadata.
Prompt/Query split mapping is dataset-specific and should not be generalized.

datasets.name: ruspellgold
datasets.license_usage_status: Dataset package declares Apache-2.0, but underlying source-text copyright caveats remain; do not vendor full dumps by default.
known_limitations: No detailed labels or edit spans are provided; importer assigns coarse spelling label.
Identical source/correction pairs are skipped unless --keep-identical is passed.
Domain shards duplicate the complete split and should not be combined with it.
